name: snakecase
documentation: ## Snakecase Coverter > Covert camelCase to snake_case ## Screenshot ## Install ``` $ pip install snakecase ``` ## Usage ```python import snakecase print (snakecase.convert("YoginthVar")) #=> yoginth_var print (snakecase.convert("thisVariable")) #=> this_variable ``` ## Get Help There are few ways to get help: 1. Please [post questions on Stack Overflow](https://stackoverflow.com/questions/ask). You can open issues with questions, as long you add a link to your Stack Overflow question. 2. For bug reports and feature requests, open issues. 3. For direct and quick help, you can [email me](mailto://yoginth@zoho.com). ## How to contribute Have an idea? Found a bug? See [how to contribute][contributing]. Thanks! ## License [MIT][license] [LICENSE]: https://yoginth.mit-license.org/ [contributing]: /CONTRIBUTING.md
